subject: Bootstrap: org-planning — map the 11 coworkers to a team structure
body: Read cowork/coworkers/manifest.json. Produce an org chart structure in cowork/artifacts/org-chart-2026-06-19.json: domains → coworker ids → peer relationships. Include both human and agent roles. Note: agent-resources-coworker manages agent lifecycle; human-resources-coworker manages human lifecycle.
